name: NeoCube
short_description: Neocube is the puzzle game in which you try to find a way to pass a number of test chambers by using the unique features of a cube.
detailed_description:
About the game:
Neocube is the puzzle game in which you try to find a way to pass a number of test chambers by using the unique features of a cube.

Features:

- Neocube is created for testing the Artificial Intellect developed by OZOSTU Labs.

- 30 test chambers to pass and wreck your brains in the process

Story:
OZOSTU Labs created the new kind of Artificial Intelligence. Lab 23 tests the AI through the special test-chambers by using the unusual cube.
